title: Notification of sections 1, 2 (except clauses (c) and (u) of its sub-section (1)), Sections 3 to 30, Section 31 except of its application in context of the 'Tribunal', Sections 32 to 50, Sections 52 to 54, Sections 59 to 62, Sections 66 to 71, Sections 74 to 80, Section 81 except clasuses (b) to the extent of its application to Sections 51, 63 and 64 and clause (c), First Schedule

"q?# aqg^jrft [m-H. l/l/2009-"Ht.^el.V] MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 31st March, 2009 S.O. 891(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (3) of Section 1 of the Limited Liability Partnership Act, 2008, (6 of 2009), the Central Government hereby appoints the 31 st day of March, 2009 as the date on which the following sections of the said Act shall come into force, namely:— SI. No. Sections 1. Section 1 2. Section 2 except clauses (c) and (u) of its sub-section (1) 3. Sections 3 to 30 4. Section 31 except to the extent of its application in context of the 'Tribunal' 5. Sections 32 to 50 6. Sections 52 to 54 7. Sections 59 to 62 8. Sections 66 to 71 9. Sections 74 to 80 10. Section 81 except clauses (b) to the extent of its application to Sections 51, 63 and 64 and clause (c) 11. First Sehedule [F.No.l/l/2009-CL.V] JITESH KHOSLA, Jt. Secy. 1268 Gl/2009 Printed by the Manager, Govt, of India Press and Published by the Controller Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
